title: How would the characters in NGE fare in a zombie apocalyse
display_title: How would the characters in NGE fare in a zombie apocalyse
wikitext:
[]: How would the characters in NGE fare in a zombie apocalyse?             Quote Post by CyberXIII » Sun Nov 01, 2009 2:34 pm This was something that struck me when I was jacked up on sugar the other day. Imagine if Tokyo 3 was overrun with zombies and the characters had to survive through it. Who would immediately snap, and who would actually manage to escape? Part of this depends on who's writing, but I wanted some opinions...

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Sun Nov 01, 2009 2:36 pm Dude, they got evas Evas > zombies

[]:             Quote Post by CyberXIII » Sun Nov 01, 2009 2:45 pm Xard wrote: Dude, they got evas Evas > zombies

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Sun Nov 01, 2009 2:48 pm CyberXIII wrote: Xard wrote: Dude, they got evas Evas > zombies

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Sun Nov 01, 2009 2:58 pm Everyone would die, Gendo would reach enlightment, and eventually Lillith would become an angelic zombie and a new third impact scenario would occur resulting in the whole world turning into a thriller music video.

[]:             Quote Post by LeoXiao » Sun Nov 01, 2009 3:18 pm Would zombies turn into LCL upon 3I?

[]:             Quote Post by Guyver Spawn » Sun Nov 01, 2009 3:19 pm Depends on the Zombies that they are fighting against. If just them without the eva's then most of them will end up dead. Angel zombies on the other hand is a different story .

[]:             Quote Post by backseatjesus » Sun Nov 01, 2009 4:17 pm Xard wrote: CyberXIII wrote: Xard wrote: Dude, they got evas Evas > zombies

[]:             Quote Post by Sammaeloo » Sun Nov 01, 2009 4:39 pm Tokyo-3 has all those gun turrets, missle launchers, military vehicles, and not to mention all those JSDF soldiers. They have those shelters in the Geofront too. The trump card would be the Evas. They could shoot them with their gigantic guns as well as squashing zombies with their hands and feet. The Evas could roll around in crowds of them like a giant rolling pin.

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Sun Nov 01, 2009 4:40 pm Oh they may have all that but do they have... ASH WILLIAMS!?

[]:             Quote Post by backseatjesus » Sun Nov 01, 2009 5:13 pm Sammaeloo wrote: Tokyo-3 has all those gun turrets, missle launchers, military vehicles, and not to mention all those JSDF soldiers. They have those shelters in the Geofront too. The trump card would be the Evas. They could shoot them with their gigantic guns as well as squashing zombies with their hands and feet. The Evas could roll around in crowds of them like a giant rolling pin.

[]:             Quote Post by Great Genius Shinji-Sama » Sun Nov 01, 2009 5:19 pm Id say a zombie apocalypse and an angel attack would be similar, "The safest place you can be is in an Eva."

[]:             Quote Post by Uriel Septim VII » Sun Nov 01, 2009 6:05 pm The zombies would tear through the umbilical cords, but could they penetrate the EVAs?

[]:             Quote Post by Great Genius Shinji-Sama » Sun Nov 01, 2009 6:18 pm Yeah, but how c\long can they stay in Eva? In the series we saw that Shinji could have died if he stayed in too long without life support, and they cant stay inside forever. The pilots would be safe for a while, but the NERV staff and cicilians would be fucked.

[]:             Quote Post by Guyver Spawn » Sun Nov 01, 2009 7:05 pm Just imagine Zombie Angels like Zombie Sachiel would be like. When they bite the Evas then they become mindless Zombies also.

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Sun Nov 01, 2009 7:21 pm The only angels that are capable of biting the Evas would be Sandalphon, Gaghiel, and Unit-04 possessed by Bardiel. However they'd have to be able to chomp through the armor to actually be able to pierce the skin. Bardiel can only be in water and Sandalphon can only be in magma from what we've seen and that is a major disadvantage on their part for the angels.

[]:             Quote Post by Great Genius Shinji-Sama » Sun Nov 01, 2009 7:26 pm But like I was saying, you cant bunk out in Eva forever and if they bite through the umbilical cord, then the Evas are useless unless you can get them to berserk.

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Sun Nov 01, 2009 7:34 pm Yes but even if they destroy the umbilical cord the armor is still there. Another thing is the Angel's skin themselves. I assume that the angel's skin are probably really thick and the only angel that really can get bitten and turn would be Tabris.

[]:             Quote Post by Gamer_2k4 » Sun Nov 01, 2009 9:04 pm Poorly. NERV couldn't even hold off the JSDF, so why would they be able to stop zombies? Sure, everyone else could get into shelters and the like, but those will only hold for so long.

[]:             Quote Post by Evangelion__x » Sun Nov 01, 2009 9:20 pm backseatjesus wrote: But, it'd only be a matter of time before something extremely bad happened. What if someone who got bit managed to get through security and bit someone else, thus leading to chaos. Fact is, no matter how secure you are in a Zombie Apocalypse, you're never truly safe and it's only a matter of time before you meet your doom. One thing Zombies don't have to worry about is time.

Part of this depends on who's writing, but I wanted some opinions...
